description: As Professor Anderson (username: teacher1, password: Teacher1234!), log in to http://localhost/moodle and record grades and feedback for the "Lab 3: Titration Analysis" assignment in the "Chemistry 101" (CHEM101) course. Assign Jane Smith (jsmith) a grade of 85.00 with feedback "Good analysis of error margins. Calculation in section 2 is correct.", Michael Jones (mjones) a grade of 92.50 with feedback "Excellent graphs and data presentation. Perfect result.", and Alice Wilson (awilson) a grade of 78.00 with feedback "Missing the final conclusion section. Please review the rubric." Ensure all grades are saved and recorded in the system.
